channel.title: Blog on Youssef Ben Salem
channel.description: Recent content in Blog on Youssef Ben Salem

item.title: The Agentic AI Revolution in Enterprise
item.description:
The integration of Agentic Artificial Intelligence into enterprise ecosystems marks a major turning point.

Context Engineering with GraphRAG

To optimize vector and contextual search, the use of GraphRAG allows autonomous agents to better understand business semantics.

Complex Workflows

Solutions like n8n and LangGraph have become essential for orchestrating multi-agent workflows, where each agent (A2A) interacts to solve end-to-end business problems.

item.title: Testing Markdown, Code, and Mermaid
item.description:
This post verifies that the site’s rendering pipeline supports all required technical writing formats seamlessly.

1. Standard Markdown

You can write normal markdown content easily:

  • Bold text and italic text.
  • Lists with multiple items.
  • Links to external sites
  • Blockquotes for important callouts.

“A well-architected system is a joy to behold.” — Youssef Ben Salem

2. Source Code Highlighting

Writing code is natively supported via Hugo’s Chroma syntax highlighter. Here is a quick Python script:
